text.title: TTS Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for a single-call TTS synthesis: preprocess → select voice → check cache → route provider → call API → log + return.

step.name: preprocess-text
step.input: raw text payload (LLM output, news headline, notification body)
step.action: Apply preprocess_for_tts(): strip Markdown headings (`#{1,6}\s+`), strip bold/italic (`\*+([^*]+)\*+`, `_([^_]+)_`), strip HTML (`<[^>]+>`), expand `$` → ` dollars `, `%` → ` percent `, expand abbreviation list (`API` → `A-P-I`).
step.output: cleaned UTF-8 string, ≤4000 chars (reject longer payloads, route to tts-implementation).
step.decision-gate: if len(cleaned) > 4000 → return status="error", error="payload exceeds 4000 chars, route to tts-implementation".

step.name: select-voice
step.action: Look up VOICE_MAP[content_type][provider] in `templates/voice-map.py`. Default provider is OpenAI unless overridden.
step.output: provider-native voice id (e.g., "nova" for OpenAI assistant, "en-US-Neural2-F" for Google narrator).

step.name: check-cache
step.input: cleaned text, voice id, speed, model, provider
step.action: Compute `cache_key = sha256(f"{text}|{voice}|{speed}|{model}|{provider}").hexdigest()`. Probe `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}.{format}`; if exists, return {cached=true, path=...}.
step.decision-gate: if cache hit → skip steps 4–5, jump to step 6 with cached=true.

step.name: route-provider
step.input: cleaned text, requested provider, SSML presence flag
step.action: Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. If text contains `<` and `>` → force provider in {google, azure}. If language not in OpenAI's supported set → fall back to ElevenLabs or Google.

step.name: synthesize
step.input: cleaned text, voice id, speed, model, provider
step.action: Call provider SDK with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff). Stream response to `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}.{format}`. For batch contexts, sleep(60/RPM) between calls (rule r6).
step.output: saved audio file path; raw provider response object.

step.name: measure-and-log
step.action: Measure duration with `pydub.AudioSegment.from_file(path).duration_seconds`. If duration == 0.0, return status="error", error="0-second audio". Log {provider, voice, char_count, duration, cached} to the pipeline metrics sink.
